name: Hypoglycemia
avoid_foods: Alcohol,sugary snacks alone,high-glycemic foods without protein
recommended_foods:
Complex
carbohydrates,whole-grain crackers with cheese,nut butter

name: Atrial Fibrillation
recommended_foods:
Leafy greens in
consistent amounts,lean protein,whole grains

name: Deep Vein Thrombosis (on anticoagulants)
avoid_foods:
Excess alcohol,sudden large vitamin K
intake changes

name: Chronic Bronchitis
avoid_foods: Excess dairy if mucus-sensitive,fried foods,sugary drinks

name: Chronic Sinusitis
avoid_foods: Dairy in excess if mucus-sensitive,sugary snacks

name: Parkinson's Disease
avoid_foods:
High-protein meals close to medication times,fried
foods

name: Crohn's Disease
avoid_foods:
Raw high-fiber vegetables during flares,spicy food,dairy if
intolerant

name: Gastroparesis
recommended_foods:
Low-fat low-fiber pureed
foods,small frequent meals

name: Short Bowel Syndrome
recommended_foods:
Small frequent
nutrient-dense meals,oral rehydration fluids

name: Hypothyroidism
avoid_foods:
Excess soy,large amounts of raw cruciferous vegetables,processed
food

name: Scleroderma
recommended_foods:
Small frequent meals,soft cooked
vegetables,lean protein

name: Atopic Dermatitis (Eczema)
avoid_foods:
Dairy if triggering,processed food,allergenic nuts if
sensitive

name: Iron Deficiency Anemia
avoid_foods:
Tea/coffee with meals,high-calcium foods with iron
meals

name: Thalassemia
avoid_foods: Iron-fortified foods,excess vitamin C with meals

name: Thrombocytopenia
recommended_foods:
Leafy greens,vitamin K
rich vegetables,lean protein

name: Osteopenia
recommended_foods:
Calcium-rich dairy,leafy greens,vitamin D
fortified food

name: Bipolar Disorder (Nutritional Support)
recommended_foods:
Omega-3 fatty
fish,whole grains,consistent balanced meals

name: Binge Eating Disorder (Nutritional Support)
avoid_foods:
Highly processed trigger snacks eaten
alone,sugary drinks

name: Glaucoma
avoid_foods: Excess caffeine,large fluid volumes in one sitting

name: Soy Allergy
recommended_foods:
Dairy or non-soy plant

name: Lactose Intolerance
recommended_foods:
Lactose-free dairy,almond

name: Hereditary Hemochromatosis
recommended_foods:
Tea
or coffee with meals,calcium-rich foods,whole grains

avoid_foods:
Tea with meals,excess cow's milk
volume

High-fat meals pre-exercise,excess fiber before

recommended_foods: Low-fiber cooked foods progressing to high fiber,lean protein

recommended_foods:
